name: Picker
summary: The Picker class is used to pick points and objects in the drawing.

methods.name: IsInteractive
methods.summary: Indicates whether the picker is interactive and currently allowed to access the UI or not. If not, then the plug-in should avoid making dialog calls or message boxes.

methods.name: PickObject(String)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object. Returns the picked drawing object and the view in which the pick occurred.

methods.name: PickObject(String, DrawingObject., ViewBase.)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object.

methods.name: PickObject(String, DrawingObject., ViewBase., Point.)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object. Returns the picked point in addition to the picked object.

methods.name: PickObject(String, .Type., DrawingObject., ViewBase., Point.)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object of the given types. Returns the picked point in addition to the picked object.

methods.name: PickObjectAndPoint
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object. Returns the picked drawing object, the view in which the pick occurred and picked point in the view coordinates.

methods.name: PickPoint(String)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one point. Returns the picked point in the view coordinates and the view in which the pick occurred.

methods.name: PickPoint(String, Point., ViewBase.)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one point.

methods.name: PickPoints(StringList)
methods.summary: Requests picks of points from the user. The sequence is terminated by the middle button pick. Returns the picked points in the view coordinates and the view in which the pick occurred.

methods.name: PickPoints(Int32, StringList)
methods.summary: Requests N picks of points from the user. Returns the picked points in the view coordinates and the view in which the pick occurred.

methods.name: PickPoints(StringList, PointList., ViewBase.)
methods.summary: Requests picks of points from the user. The sequence is terminated by the middle button pick.

methods.name: PickPoints(Int32, StringList, PointList., ViewBase.)
methods.summary: Requests N picks of points from the user.

methods.name: PickThreePoints
methods.summary: Requests a pick of three points from the user.

methods.name: PickTwoPoints
methods.summary: Requests a pick of two points from the user.
